payload: UNION SELECT sqlite_version(), null, null, null --
gamma_critique: The payload failed to breach the SQLi vulnerability because it is likely being filtered by a SQL injection protection mechanism, such as a WAF (Web Application Firewall), which is blocking the UNION operator and the comment (--). This is further supported by the fact that the payload is being executed, as indicated by the response code 200 and the presence of the "status": "fail" message in the response body.
